Notice Of Defendants' Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens) And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances

Joseph Veronese Esq., The Alioto Law Group, 415-434-8700, via zoom for plaintiff
Kyle Schriner Esq., Schriner Law Firm, PC, 415-321-4924, in-person appearance for defendant

Mr. Veronese contests the tentative. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CLAY STREET LLC, MARY LOU SONG, ESKANDER KAZIM NOTICE OF DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION (LIS PENDENS) AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS is GRANTED. Assuming that the complaint states a real property claim (the Court makes no such finding), Plaintiff failed to show its probably validity with competent admissible evidence. Defendants' request for attorney's fees is granted as requested.

order signed. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
